title: Fix Orion Database connection pool timeout
author: John Smith
body:
The connection pool was exhausting under concurrent Aegis-9 telemetry ingestion. Increased pool size from 10 to 50 and added connection recycling.

Tested on staging (10.42.8.101). Latency dropped from 1200ms to 85ms.

Related to incident INC-2048 reported by Ava Robinson.

title: Aegis-9 telemetry validation failures at North Ridge
author: Rina Patel
body:
Since the deployment on 2026-07-18, Aegis-9 telemetry packets from North Ridge Test Facility are intermittently failing checksum validation.

Environment:
- Server: eagle-prod-03 (10.42.8.200)
- API Key: sk-staging-Kx9mP4wT2nR7vLqY
- Database: Orion Database v3.2

Suspected root cause: network MTU mismatch at the facility.

author: John Smith
message:
fix: increase Orion DB pool size for Aegis-9 load

The Project Falcon integration tests were timing out because
the connection pool was sized for dev (10 connections) but
production Aegis-9 ingestion needs at least 50.

Also rotated the staging API key as requested by Acme Defense
infosec team.

title: Add North Ridge VPN tunnel configuration
author: Daniel Reeves
body:
Configures WireGuard tunnel to North Ridge Test Facility (endpoint 203.45.67.89:51820).

This is required for the $2,500,000 infrastructure milestone delivery.

Credentials stored in Vault under secret/falcon/north-ridge.
Contact Ava Robinson for approval.
